publishedAbstract: - When creating a HostedCluster on a KubeVirt platform with ODF (CephFS) storage, the manual `storageClassMapping` configuration is ignored.- Only the default `kubevirt-csi-infra-default` storage class is visible in the hosted cluster, despite having specified an infra/guest mapping.
publishedTitle: StorageClass mapping in KubeVirt-based HostedCluster does not take effect
